Savings Finance Research and Application Centre is Established in Cooperation with AFI

17.08.2023

A protocol has signed between Ibn Haldun University and the Savings Finance Sector under the umbrella of the Association of Financial Institutions (AFI) for the establishment of the Savings Finance Research and Application Centre.

The Savings Finance Research and Application Centre, which will be established within the university with the support of the AFI, will carry out studies to raise awareness of savings, increase product diversity, conduct scientific research and increase financial literacy.
